title: Sakay
subtitle: Riding — Jeepneys, Tricycles, and Para Po!

wrong_answer_tracking.behaviour: Wrong answers go to back of current session queue.
wrong_answer_tracking.wrong_count_usage: Feed to Gemini system prompt for AI Practice.

alam_mo_ba: Jeepneys were originally built from American military jeeps left behind after World War II. Filipinos repainted, extended, and decorated them into a uniquely Filipino vehicle. They are now considered a national cultural symbol — and are slowly being phased out for modern electric jeepneys.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
